stemHtml: If an aircraft is flying above its VA speed, a manoeuvre where the pilot pulls all the way back on the controls will cause which of the following?

options.a: A stall, as the aircraft will reach its limit load factor.
options.b: No stall, but structural damage may occur.
options.c: No stall, and the aircraft will be undamaged.
options.d: A stall, as the wing will exceed the critical angle of attack.
